showFloatingHelpersPanel: Mostrar panel de colaboradores flotantes en OpenFront
hideFloatingHelpersPanel: Ocultar panel de colaboradores flotantes en OpenFront
Show floating helpers panel on OpenFront: Mostrar panel de colaboradores flotantes en OpenFront
If openfront.io was already open when yo: Se Openfront.io xa estaba aberto cando instalaches esta extensión, recarga a pestana unha vez. En caso contrario, a extensión non funcionará nesta pestana.
Adds a red marker to nation AI names on: Engade un marcador vermello aos nomes da nación no mapa.
Engade un marcador vermello aos nomes da nación.
Highlights allies with remaining allianc: Destacan os aliados co tempo de alianza.
⚠ Only available in solo or custom games: Por favor, use só en xogos individuais ou personalizados.
Shows predicted enemy nuke landing point: Mostra os puntos de aterramento inimigo preditos e o raio de explosión.
Mostra os puntos de aterraxe inimigos preditos e raio de explosión.
Shows enemy boat landing points. Red = t: Mostra puntos de desembarco inimigo. Vermello = atacar a ti, amarelo = atacar a outros.
Hover an enemy to show high-damage atom: Inimigo para mostrar obxectivos de átomo e hidróxeno de alto nivel.
Adds auto economy and population nuke ac: Engade a economía do automóbil e as accións de nuke de poboación á roda do xogador.
Also show auto nuke options when right-c: Tamén amosar opcións de nuke auto cando o botón dereito dos xogadores aliados.
Team games only: blocks trades with play: Xogos de equipo só: bloques de comercios con xogadores que non están no seu equipo.
Blocks trades with players who are not o: Bloquear o comercio con xogadores que non están no teu equipo.
Available only during an active team gam: Dispoñible só durante un xogo de equipo activo.
Engadir GPM ao xogador hover panel.
Lists each team's total GPM in team game: Lista o GPM total de cada equipo en xogos de equipo.
Lista o GPM total de cada equipo.
Lista o xogador de maior rastrexo GPM.
Shows observed ship and train trade impo: Mostra as importacións e exportacións de buques e trens observados.
Shows observed trade imports and exports: Mostra as importacións e exportacións comerciais observadas.
Highlights structures with observed trad: Destacan as estruturas cos ingresos comerciais observados.
Hover a player to highlight the partner: Un xogador para destacar a industria dos socios que alimenta as súas exportacións.
Hover a player to highlight export partn: Un xogador para destacar os socios de exportación.
Show a notification when a game is found: Mostrar unha notificación cando se atopa un xogo
Teams larger than Quads: Equipos máis grandes que os Quads
Matches team lobbies with more than 4 pl: O equipo xoga con máis de 4 xogadores por equipo.
You can turn on all three at the same ti: Podes facer os tres ao mesmo tempo. Só un ten que xogar.
Default case with no explicit starting g: O caso por defecto non ten o ouro inicial explícito.
Include requires a match. Exclude blocks: Inclúe un partido. Bloquear unha opción. Para comezar o ouro, calquera valor incluído é suficiente, mentres que os valores excluídos son sempre rexeitados.
Show Mark bot nations red preview: Marcar as nacións bot vista en vermello
analyticsOptInDescription: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports: Share anonymous usage analytics. Reports coarse feature usage to help improve the extension. No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, or chat data.
Only join lobbies whose max player count: Only join lobbies whose max player count is greater than this number.
You can turn on all four at the same tim: You can turn on all four at the same time. Only one of them has to match.
Send a transport with 1% troops, then re: Send a transport with 1% troops, then restore the attack ratio.
Moves alliance requests and renewal prom: Moves alliance requests and renewal prompts into a separate right-side window.
Right-click any tile to send a boat with: Right-click any tile to send a boat with 1% troops, then restores your ratio.
analyticsConsentIntro: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
analyticsConsentTrackedFeatureToggles: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedSummaries: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
analyticsConsentTrackedVersionLanguage: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
analyticsConsentAnonymousNoGameplay: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
analyticsConsentAnonymousLocalId: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
This helps improve the extension by show: This helps improve the extension by showing which helper features are used and where performance work matters most.
Feature toggles, such as which helper wa: Feature toggles, such as which helper was enabled or disabled.
Coarse usage summaries, such as how many: Coarse usage summaries, such as how many helpers are enabled.
Extension version and language, so issue: Extension version and language, so issues can be compared across releases.
No OpenFront account, player names, lobb: No OpenFront account, player names, lobby IDs, game IDs, chat, or free-form gameplay data is sent.
A random local analytics ID is created o: A random local analytics ID is created only after you enable this, and it is deleted when you turn it off.
